title: artifact-json
description: High-performance JSON library for Java 21+. Zero dependencies, full RFC 8259 support, SQL-like query engine, 8-format converter (JSON ↔ CSV, XML, YAML, Markdown), and dynamic proxy mapping.

title: artifact-shield
description: Reactive data firewall for AI applications built on Spring WebFlux. Intercepts and scrubs LLM prompts in real-time with deterministic PII detection. Supports OIDC, mTLS, and 10,000+ concurrent requests.
